divisions.title: Church Leadership
divisions.summary: Appoint qualified elders in every town, rebuke false teachers who corrupt sound doctrine

divisions.title: Christian Living
divisions.summary: Sound doctrine for all ages, grace teaches godliness, saved by mercy not works, do good and avoid division

chapterSummaries.1: Appoint elders in every town, qualifications for elders, rebuke false teachers
chapterSummaries.2: Sound doctrine for all ages, grace teaches us to say no to ungodliness
chapterSummaries.3: Submit to authorities, saved by mercy not works, avoid divisive people
